title: node-sass@3.11.2 breaks build 🚨
body:
Hello lovely humans, [node-sass](https://www.npmjs.com/package/node-sass) just published its new version 3.11.2.
State Failing tests :rotating_light:
Dependency node-sass
New version 3.11.2
Type devDependency
This version is **covered** by your **current version range** and after updating it in your project **the build went from success to failure**. As node-sass is “only” a devDependency of this project it **might not break production or downstream projects**, but “only” your build or test tools – **preventing new deploys or publishes**. I recommend you give this issue a high priority. I’m sure you can resolve this :muscle: Of course this could just be a false positive, caused by a flaky test suite, or third parties that are currently broken or unavailable, but that would be another problem I’d recommend working on. Do you have any ideas how I could improve these pull requests? Did I report anything you think isn’t right? Are you unsure about how things are supposed to work? There is a collection of [frequently asked questions](https://greenkeeper.io/faq.html) and while I’m just a bot, there is a group of people who are happy to teach me new things. [Let them know](https://github.com/greenkeeperio/greenkeeper/issues/new). Good luck with your project :sparkles: You rock! :palm_tree: --- [GitHub Release](https://github.com/sass/node-sass/releases/tag/v3.11.2)

Fixes

  • Regressions in handling proxies (@xzyfer, #1785, #1787)

Supported Environments

OS Architecture Node
Windows x86 & x64 0.10, 0.12, 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6,7
OSX x64 0.10, 0.12, 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7
Linux x86 & x64 0.10, 0.12, 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7
FreeBSD i386 & amd64 0.10, 0.12, 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6

*Linux support refers to Ubuntu, Debian, and CentOS 5

--- The new version differs by 21 commits . - [`7fe625c`](https://github.com/sass/node-sass/commit/7fe625c6e860e0fcac7643703c3ec14258df02e6) 3.11.2 - [`2acdcf0`](https://github.com/sass/node-sass/commit/2acdcf008fd4d5b37402c32878cf5500b1564ca3) Merge pull request #1789 from sass/fix/download-proxy-opts - [`3072444`](https://github.com/sass/node-sass/commit/307244488734d03d6bcd859b0aa205ff7f6541f3) Fix proxy config for binary download - [`b357146`](https://github.com/sass/node-sass/commit/b357146ef8dc4c6c6d8de77c0717802eb711c38d) Merge pull request #1784 from anaibol/patch-1 - [`69f263f`](https://github.com/sass/node-sass/commit/69f263f0dcec7079a39e275d9ddbf1fdbb34dbc4) Update supported node versions - [`36856f4`](https://github.com/sass/node-sass/commit/36856f4102d6a3b382b14f86d98a56d3c033307e) 3.11.1 - [`5759276`](https://github.com/sass/node-sass/commit/5759276eb63cf79b4a39001cad340fb39fe48732) Revert "Install: Use a cache folder for binary download" - [`73726fe`](https://github.com/sass/node-sass/commit/73726fe7b28b8dfc82f3e03591fa3488348abae3) 3.11.0 - [`cb328e3`](https://github.com/sass/node-sass/commit/cb328e325de6c914432770b3eaaa44af6bca88b7) Merge pull request #1753 from NicolaiSoeborg/patch-1 - [`4116c38`](https://github.com/sass/node-sass/commit/4116c389a5840fbcc7f107c3eeab6aec0a938ba5) Merge pull request #1725 from xzyfer/fix/no-proxy - [`5dba770`](https://github.com/sass/node-sass/commit/5dba770e05ea37fb833091b8f6d560a8683db9ae) Factor our proxy resolution for testability - [`3a4e9c6`](https://github.com/sass/node-sass/commit/3a4e9c6c69a0571e20a9ae48885ad23c29200109) Respect NO_PROXY when downloading the binary - [`bd6d7a3`](https://github.com/sass/node-sass/commit/bd6d7a35cb5791a33cbda0051c6d80ddffd6f0f8) Add Node 7 as a supported environment - [`d27ff73`](https://github.com/sass/node-sass/commit/d27ff73fe5bed54ce28023b87aa6bc5c30f233a0) Fix links in troubleshooting.md - [`360a430`](https://github.com/sass/node-sass/commit/360a4308bac15219782fa6f7fe4f46df8d53929e) Merge pull request #1744 from pselden/patch-1 There are 21 commits in total. See the [full diff](https://github.com/sass/node-sass/compare/7e27148d834dc2b092f4882895a0b18e70c4bbea...7fe625c6e860e0fcac7643703c3ec14258df02e6). --- This pull request was created by [greenkeeper.io](https://greenkeeper.io/).
